method: Median wall-clock time over 10 native-Bun runs (4 for the bounded slow-path workloads), deterministic generated data.

cacheEvidence.transformKernel: packages/core/tests/scale-transform.test.ts proves one parent transform per cache key across 100 subsets/facets
cacheEvidence.resize: guide/layout replanning consumes trained scale values and does not parse or transform source columns

budgetRunNote: All seven PR 3 workloads passed their measured budgets. The complete local budget command also reported three pre-existing host-sensitive overages (canvas cold, hit-index build, density); their budgets were not changed by this PR.
